original_image_tags: NASA insignia logo in upper left corner.

Circular schematic or symbol, possibly a mission patch or technical diagram, consisting of intersecting lines forming a cross shape over a grid pattern, with a smaller circular element containing what appears to be a lunar surface view.

elements.description: NASA circular logo (the 'meatball' insignia) located in the upper left corner.
A rectangular text block in the middle right containing a notice about the Freedom of Information Act and NASA Policy Directive 1382.2.
A circular diagram in the bottom left corner with intersecting lines and crosshairs, resembling a targeting or alignment symbol.
A rectangular text box in the lower center containing 'GROUP 4 Downgraded at 3-year intervals; declassified after 12 years'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the NASA logo in the upper left corner and a circular diagram with intersecting lines and crosshairs, with no contradictions on visual content.
